Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

Xterm.js is a frontend component that enables applications to bring fully-featured terminals to their users in the browser. It's used by popular projects such as [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/) (and its forks), [Tabby](https://tabby.sh/) and [Hyper](https://hyper.is/).

The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!
📟 Switch your input method through terminal
👀 A modern watch command. Time machine and pager etc.
Building powerful interactive prompts in Go, inspired by python-prompt-toolkit.
chalk — Terminal string styling done right
Stream and share terminals over the web. Show off mad cli-fu, help a colleague, teach, or troubleshoot. end-to-end encrypted 🛡

A Spotify player in the terminal with full feature parity

Web player for terminal session recordings and streams
🥧 HTTPie CLI  — modern, user-friendly command-line HTTP client for the API era. JSON support, colors, sessions, downloads, plugins & more.

ps, top and pstree for human beings

Rich-CLI is a command line toolbox for fancy output in the terminal, built with [Rich](https://github.com/Textualize/rich).
The lean application framework for Python.  Build sophisticated user interfaces with a simple Python API. Run your apps in the terminal and a web browser.

**MesosTerm** is a web-based terminal for Mesos. It allows you to execute commands
A hackable, pluggable terminal, and also a command runner.
A very fast, portable and hackable fuzzy finder.
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀
**wego** is a weather client for the terminal.
A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).
Track stocks, crypto, and derivatives prices and positions in real time from your terminal
A Minimal, Header only Modern c++ library for terminal goodies 💄✨

`radian` is no longer under active development. While I may address critical or obvious bugs, no new features will be added. If you are looking for an active alternative, I recommend checking out [arf](https://github.com/eitsupi/arf) by @eitsupi.
toggles between the vterm buffer and whatever buffer you are editing.
Clean, vibrant and pleasing color schemes for Vim, Sublime Text, iTerm, gnome-terminal and more.
IDE-style autocomplete for your existing terminal & shell
htop for Windows . TUI system monitor with per-core CPU bars, memory/swap/network, tree view, process kill, 7 color schemes, mouse support. cargo install pstop
Browse and view images in the terminal (mostly a front-end to https://github.com/AnonymouX47/term-image)
**TermOx** is a C++20 library for creating rich, interactive terminal user interfaces
A fast and lightweight interactive terminal based UI application for tracking cryptocurrencies 🚀 by @miguelmota
